meta.question: Is the task 'Complaintr ejected' always executable in this model? (Model ID: 6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63)

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Complaintr ejected")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Complaint")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("ejected")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?name ?created WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?name .
  ?model tai:normalizedId ?normId .
  FILTER(?normId = "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63")
  OPTIONAL { ?model tai:modelCreated ?created . }
}
LIMIT 10

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?name ?origId WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?name .
  ?model tai:originalId ?origId .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?origId), "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63"))
}
LIMIT 10

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  ?elem a ?type .
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("eject")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?task a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task bbo:name ?name .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63" .
}
LIMIT 50

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task ?name ?initPartRef WHERE {
  ?task a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task bbo:name ?name .
  ?task bboExt:initiatingParticipantRef ?initPartRef .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Complaint")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flow ?name ?conditionExpression WHERE {
  ?flow a bbo:SequenceFlow .
  ?flow bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?flow) CONTAINS("sid-3DA707DF-68DC-462F-86F6-70C3509A3875"))
  OPTIONAL { ?flow bbo:conditionExpression ?conditionExpression . }
}
LIMIT 10
